requirements.text: Extension loads in a real OMP session without errors
requirements.acceptance: omp -p -e ./index.ts "echo test" exits 0 with no error output; no Cannot find module or TypeError in output

requirements.text: session_start event fires and extension initializes
requirements.acceptance: Session journal contains a session entry with correct cwd; session_start handler runs (widget update or notification). If mode=off, runSelection does NOT fire
omp -p --mode json -e ./index.ts "/ultramode status" output includes mode: off, bead: none, phase: selecting, retries: 0/3

requirements.text: /ultramode on activates the loop and triggers work selection
requirements.acceptance: bv --robot-triage --format json is called; br scheduler --json is called; decide() is called (notification or idle); state persisted as ultramode-control entry with mode: on

requirements.text: sendUserMessage injects a phase command the agent processes
requirements.acceptance: Session journal shows user message entry with /create <bead-id> content followed by agent execution

requirements.text: turn_end fires the decision loop after a phase completes
requirements.acceptance: After /create completes, turn_end fires; handleTurnEnd calls decide(); decision acted on (next command injected or mode=idle)

requirements.text: State survives session restart via journal reconstruction
requirements.acceptance: After /ultramode on in session A, terminate, resume with --continue, /ultramode status shows mode=on reconstructed from journal
No duplicate phase commands in session journal. If hasPendingMessages unavailable, guard is no-op and documented

requirements.text: Retry cap marks bead blocked after 3 retries
requirements.acceptance: After 3 retries, br update <bead-id> --status blocked fires; state resets to selecting; loop picks next bead
/ultramode status shows mode: off; subsequent turns do not trigger decision calls

requirements.text: /ultramode continue resets and picks next bead
requirements.acceptance: State resets (beadId=null, phase=selecting, retries=0), runSelection() fires, new bead selected
grep -c /close <session-journal> returns 0 matches in message content across all sessions

success_criteria: Extension loads in a real OMP session without errors
/ultramode status returns correct initial state (mode=off, bead=none, phase=selecting, retries=0)
/ultramode on triggers work selection (bv + br exec calls fire, LLM decision made)
State persisted to session journal as ultramode-control custom entries
sendUserMessage injects phase commands the agent processes
turn_end fires decision loop after phase completion
State survives session restart via getBranch() reconstruction
No /close command ever injected in any session
All findings documented in completion-evidence.json with observed output
